message:
feat(robot): add ensemble modes and presets robot API

Implement machine-readable JSON output for ensemble configuration:
- --robot-ensemble-modes: Lists reasoning modes with filtering (category, tier)
  and pagination support
- --robot-ensemble-presets: Lists ensemble presets with mode codes and budget info

Both endpoints include agent hints for AI consumers.

Closes: bd-1mdym

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
